subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the holy fragrances! That which thou didst write was perused. The longing to attain the blessing of kissing the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات قدس آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید شوق تشرف بتقبیل آستان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @unity; oneness of humanity, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @personal instructions, @wisdom [hikmat]
